behavior_summary: U8P_BENCHEW::look is the object's 'U8P_BENCHEW::look' (examine) handler: when the player examines this object/NPC it emits a short bark 'bench ' and then suspends the U8P_BENCHEW::look process.

U8P_BENCHEW::gotHit is a small utility/process invoked when the item is hit: it checks its first parameter and, if that parameter is zero/false, calls Item::setFrame(0x01, this) to change the item's sprite/frame to index 1 (a visual reaction to being hit).
No global flags are read or written by these routines; behavior is limited to presentation (bark) and a conditional visual update.
notable_control_flow: U8P_BENCHEW::look: immediate linear flow — emit bark 'bench ' then suspend/terminate the U8P_BENCHEW::look handling.
U8P_BENCHEW::gotHit: conditional branch on first parameter -> if false/zero then invoke external Item::setFrame to set frame 1; otherwise do nothing.
open_questions: When and by what subsystem/process is U8P_BENCHEW::gotHit invoked at runtime (combat system, collision, or other event)?
What is the semantic meaning of the second parameter to U8P_BENCHEW::gotHit (word) — unused in the disassembly excerpt and therefore unclear?
What exact engine effect does 'suspend' produce here (pause only the U8P_BENCHEW::look process, fully terminate it, or yield to the scheduler)?

main_function.name: U8P_BENCHEW::look
main_function.purpose: Provide the short examine/description response for this object by showing a one-line bark and stopping further U8P_BENCHEW::look processing.
entry_conditions: Triggered by the player 'U8P_BENCHEW::look' or examine action on this object/NPC (process type 0x0208).

function_map.name: U8P_BENCHEW::look
function_map.role: examine/U8P_BENCHEW::look handler that displays a short bark then suspends

function_map.name: U8P_BENCHEW::gotHit
function_map.role: react-to-hit utility that conditionally updates the item's frame

function_map.name: Item::setFrame
function_map.role: engine/item API used to change an item's visual/sprite frame

external_calls.purpose: Change the current item's sprite/frame to index 1 as a visual response to being hit.

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: U8P_BENCHEW::look is the object's 'U8P_BENCHEW::look' (examine) handler: when the player examines this object/NPC it emits a short bark 'bench ' and then suspends the U8P_BENCHEW::look process.
